Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests

Class SequentSimplifierTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests.AbstractTransformerTests
org.eventb.core.seqprover.transformer.tests.SequentSimplifierTest
public class SequentSimplifierTest extends AbstractTransformerTests
Acceptance tests for class SequentSimplifier. Test methods are named after rule names in both the PP translator specification (PR* and AR*) and the rewrite rules on the event-B wiki.
